title: Susannah Flood, Star of Pulitzer-Winning ‘Liberation,’ on Her Journey to the Tonys
summary: The accomplished theater actress pays tribute to her father, veteran acting teacher Peter Gosnell Flood.

title: How to fast travel in Gothic Remake
summary: Teleport between The Colony's camps at will.
body: Unlocking fast travel in Gothic Remake will likely be a priority as soon as you start getting tired of traipsing up and down the same road to the Swamp Camp over and over. There are other ways to move quickly in Gothic—the Scavenger mount you can ride, for one—but if you want actual instantaneous fast travel, it's going to take a little work to acquire it. Thankfully, though, the Gothic Remake at least has proper fast travel; there's none of that Dragon's Dogma 2 riding in a cart for 12 hours and seemingly being attacked by every cyclops on the map during your journey. How to unlock fast travel in Gothic Remake You'll get your first teleport rune from Cor Angar at the start of Chapter 3 Alkimia Interactive Use the spell rune to teleport at the cost of mana Alkimia Interactive Saturas will give you a teleport rune for the New Camp in Chapter 3 too Alkimia Interactive First off, unlocking fast travel is tied to your main story quest progress . You won't get the Swamp Camp fast travel rune (the first item you acquire to teleport) until the start of Chapter 3, which requires a fair bit of quest progress with the main story Swamp Camp quests. To clarify, this doesn't mean you need to j…
